input.headline: Giant spider web found in Greek-Albanian border cave

raw.headline: Giant spider web found in Greek-Albanian border cave

winner: Found in the same cave: a group of bachelors, refusing to share the last thread.

candidates.text: Why did the giant spider avoid visiting Athens? Because he didn't want to get tangled up in the bureaucratic web!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'web' and 'bureaucratic web' are clever and specific to the headline, with good surprise and natural flow."}

candidates.text: Why did the giant spider open a travel agency on the Greek-Albanian border? Because it wanted to spin a web of deals!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'spin a web of deals' pun, but it's a bit generic and relies on a common spider/web pun rather than fully leveraging the specific context of the Greek-Albanian border cave."}

candidates.text: Why did the giant spider open a travel agency at the Greek-Albanian border? Because it wanted to weave web deals for tourists!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the spider opening a travel agency and using 'web deals,' but the pun is weak and the connection to the headline is not very tight."}

candidates.text: Why don't giants use the cave at the Greek-Albanian border? Because they can't find their way out of that tiny spider web!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks a strong punchline and relies on a weak pun."}

candidates.text: Found in the same cave: a group of bachelors, refusing to share the last thread.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'thread' and 'bachelors,' but it lacks specificity to the headline and feels a bit forced."}
